instruction: Skill for advanced development with Next.js 15+ App Router. Use to manage Server/Client Components, optimization of dynamic routes, streaming and fetching of data with cache by domain. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Objective Design Next.js 15 applications with minimal JS on the client and maximum operational predictability.  ## Rules

workflow.action: Mapear rotas e classify cada pagina como Server ou Client Component.
Define strategy of cache and revalidation by domain of given.
Implementar errorr boundaries e loading states by segmento of rota.
Otimizar data fetching with parallel fetch e React cache().
Medir performance with Web Vitals e bundle analyzer.

outputContract: Mapa of rotas with classificacao Server/Client.
Matriz of cache e revalidation by dominio.
